# freeswitch_domain (Resource)

A FreeSWITCH directory domain (tenant).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_domain" "main" {
  name        = "192.168.48.143"
  description = "Main PBX domain"

  variables = {
    default_language = "en"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name (e.g. the FreeSWITCH $${domain}).

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `variables` (Map of String) Domain-level variables.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_domain is imported by its name.
terraform import freeswitch_domain.main 192.168.48.143
```
